package rulefixtures

import (
	"crypto/aes"
	"crypto/cipher"
)

// scenario for constant_encryption_key: `[]byte("...")` used directly as arguments to `cipher.NewGCM`, `aes.NewCipher`, or similar encryption constructor calls
// fixture polarity: positive; family: security; severity: error.
func scenario699Positive(payload []byte) ([]byte, error) {
	block, err := aes.NewCipher([]byte("0123456789abcdef"))
	if err != nil { return nil, err }
	gcm, err := cipher.NewGCM(block)
	if err != nil { return nil, err }
	return gcm.Seal(nil, make([]byte, gcm.NonceSize()), payload, nil), nil
}
